name: example-html-ppt-zhangzara-signal
title: Html Ppt Zhangzara Signal
description: Signal — Deep navy canvas with bone paper and a single muted-gold accent; institutional with quiet weight. Anything that should feel weighty, considered, and credibly institutional: investor decks, board presentations, consulting deliverables, legal / policy briefs, advisory pitches.
